Query.SQL: SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ AE.AE_NUMBER AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", 'AE' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "C.COURT_CODE", CT.NAME AS "C.COURT_NAME", NULL AS "C.PRE_ISSUE_BALANCE", AE.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.CASE_NUMBER", NULL AS "C.CASE_STATUS", NULL AS "C.WARRANT_ID", NULL AS "C.WARRANT_TYPE", NULL AS "C.DEBT", NULL AS "C.WARRANT_EXECUTING_COURT", NULL AS "C.WARRANT_ISSUING_COURT", NULL AS "C.CO_TYPE" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AE, CASES C, COURTS CT WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${param.aeNumber} AND C.CASE_NUMBER = AE.CASE_NUMBER AND CT.CODE = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE

SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "C.PARTY_NAME", 'JUDGMENT CREDITOR' AS "C.PARTY_ROLE", NULL AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER", P.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", CPR.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID", CPR.REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE", CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG", CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AE, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, PARTIES P, CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = AE.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = AE.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AE.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID (+) = P.PARTY_ID UNION SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "C.PARTY_NAME", 'JUDGMENT DEBTOR' AS "C.PARTY_ROLE", NULL AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER", P.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", CPR.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID", CPR.REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE", CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG", CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AE, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, PARTIES P, CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = AE.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = AE.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AE.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID (+) = P.PARTY_ID UNION SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "C.PARTY_NAME", 'EMPLOYER' AS "C.PARTY_ROLE", NULL AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER", P.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", P.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID", G.REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE", NULL AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG", CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AE, PARTIES P, GIVEN_ADDRESSES G, CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND P.PARTY_ID = AE.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID AND P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME IS NOT NULL AND G.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND G.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'EMPLOYER' AND G.VALID_TO IS NULL AND CP.PARTY_ID (+) = P.PARTY_ID

SELECT G.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1", G.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2", G.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3", G.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4", G.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5", G.POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, GIVEN_ADDRESSES G WHERE CPR.PARTY_ID = ${C.PARTY_ID} AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND G.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND G.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND G.CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND G.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SERVICE' AND G.VALID_TO IS NULL UNION SELECT G.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1", G.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2", G.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3", G.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4", G.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5", G.POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE" FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES G WHERE G.PARTY_ID = ${C.PARTY_ID} AND G.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'EMPLOYER' AND G.VALID_TO IS NULL UNION SELECT G.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1", G.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2", G.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3", G.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4", G.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5", G.POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE" FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES G WHERE G.PARTY_ID = ${C.PARTY_ID} AND G.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY' AND G.VALID_TO IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "C.CO_INFO" FROM CASE_EVENTS CE WHERE CE.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID = 705 AND CE.DELETED_FLAG != 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "C.NO_EVENTS" FROM AE_EVENTS AEE WHERE AEE.AE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND ( AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 815 OR AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 820 OR AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 826 OR AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 829 OR AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 832 OR AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 880 OR AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 881 OR AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 882 OR AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 897 OR AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 898 OR AEE.STD_EVENT_ID = 899 ) AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT COALESCE(AE.AMOUNT_OF_AE, 0) + COALESCE( ( SELECT SUM(F.AMOUNT) FROM FEES_PAID F WHERE F.PROCESS_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} ), 0 ) - COALESCE( ( SELECT SUM(PY.AMOUNT) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' ), 0 ) AS "C.BALANCE" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AE WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER}

SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "C.MONEY_IN_COURT" FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'AE' AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND PY.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL
